description:
A fast, rule-based CLI tool for organizing your files


Release v1.1.0
✨ What’s New
- Linting system to detect contradictions in rules
- Monitoring system for auto-sorting files in a given folder
⚠️ Breaking Changes
None
📝 Additional Notes
- Version bump due to features addition
